# Pull Request Template

## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe the changes and the problem they solve -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the changes.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated to reflect the changes (English and Japanese paired).

## Documentation Checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] **JA/EN Sync**: Changes verify consistency between Japanese and English pages.
- [ ] **Glossary/Terminology**: New terms are added to `scripts/terms.csv` if needed.
- [ ] **Notebook Tags**: New notebooks have appropriate tags (`ci-light`, `ci-heavy`, `display-only`).
- [ ] **Quickstart**: Quickstart snippets in documentation are verified with `scripts/run_quickstart_test.py`.

## Impact

<!-- Any breaking changes or performance considerations? -->
